step_rationale: Early plaque inflammation marker; eicosanoid synthesis driving inflammatory response.
mechanism: Prostaglandin D synthase participates in eicosanoid-mediated plaque inflammation and platelet modulation during atherothrombotic rupture.

references.title: Data-Independent Acquisition Proteomics Identifies Plasma Prostaglandin-H2 D-Isomerase as an Early Diagnostic Biomarker for STEMI and NSTEMI.
